title: Growth concern
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

presenting_history.text: Specifies suckling, bottle feeding, routines, environment, aversion, interaction, appetite, food types, and feeding-diary domains.
presenting_history.rationale: Directly supports mapped feeding and nutrition-history documentation.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Specifies suckling, bottle feeding, routines, environment, aversion, interaction, appetite, food types, and feeding-diary domains.

source.title: Faltering growth: recognition and management of faltering growth in children — Recommendations

examination.text: Defines the 1-month-to-6-year population and requires parent history, age-specific physical examination, vital signs, developmental milestones, screening, vaccination discussion, and EMR documentation.
examination.rationale: Supports the age-limited UAE growth-screening and physical-assessment context.
examination.evidence_extract: Defines the 1-month-to-6-year population and requires parent history, age-specific physical examination, vital signs, developmental milestones, screening, vaccination discussion, and EMR documentation.

exact_section.heading: 1. Standard Scope; 3.1 History Components; 3.2 Comprehensive Physical Examination

investigations.text: Specifies age-linked weight, length or height, head circumference, growth plotting, feeding and medical history, developmental milestones, screening, immunization review, and caregiver counselling.
investigations.rationale: Directly supports mapped weight, length or height, head circumference, growth-chart, feeding-history, and prior-record documentation.
investigations.evidence_extract: Specifies age-linked weight, length or height, head circumference, growth plotting, feeding and medical history, developmental milestones, screening, immunization review, and caregiver counselling.

investigations.text: Specifies weight and height measurement, clinical/developmental/social assessment, detailed feeding or eating history, observation, and assessment-directed investigations.
investigations.rationale: Directly supports mapped growth concern, weight loss, measurement, feeding, appetite, developmental, social, and clinical-assessment items.
investigations.evidence_extract: Specifies weight and height measurement, clinical/developmental/social assessment, detailed feeding or eating history, observation, and assessment-directed investigations.

source.title: Faltering growth: recognition and management of faltering growth in children — Recommendations

referral.text: Defines growth monitoring and referral for underlying disorder, failure to respond, slow growth, rapid weight loss, severe undernutrition, safeguarding concern, or acute illness.
referral.rationale: Directly supports mapped monitoring, worsening concern, and clinician-arranged referral documentation.
referral.evidence_extract: Defines growth monitoring and referral for underlying disorder, failure to respond, slow growth, rapid weight loss, severe undernutrition, safeguarding concern, or acute illness.

source_limitations: Short stature, broad chronic disease, respiratory negatives, and the legacy failure-to-thrive diagnosis label are not fully supported by the reviewed sections.
The DoH standard has an effective date of TBD and an age limit of 6 years.
Fixed follow-up intervals and generic normal findings remain unsupported.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
